_meta.description: Submit a prompt to DeepSeek and capture the response.
_meta.notes: DeepSeek uses div[role=button] not <button>. Send button class: ds-icon-button--sizing-container. Cloudflare Turnstile present — CDP isTrusted events may bypass it; manual click confirmed to work. wait_for uses fixed delay instead of stop-button polling (stop button selector unconfirmed).

params.prompt: Say hello in exactly one sentence.

prompt_input.description: Native textarea — placeholder='Message DeepSeek' confirmed by DOM probe

send_button.description: Send button — div[role=button] with stable class ds-icon-button--sizing-container

chain.note: Start a fresh chat to avoid leftover state
Type prompt — nativeInputValueSetter sets React state. No submit:true; explicit click follows.
Brief pause for React onChange to propagate
Click send button explicitly — more reliable than Enter for React+Cloudflare
Fixed wait for generation — DeepThink can take 30-60s. TODO: replace with wait_for once stop-button selector confirmed.
Confirmed working selector from manual run
